{{Quote|Well, things haven't been entirely easy for us here on Belderone, with the Rebellion getting so close...|Zana|<ref name="annual" />}}
'''Zana''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] living on [[Belderone/Legends|Belderone]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Zana had a romance with a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]<ref name="annual" /> named [[Flint Torul]] who was posted to Belderone—the two conceived a son, also called [[Flint]], before Torul was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in battle by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]].<ref name="US">{{InsiderCite|86|Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous}}</ref> Zana, forced to raise her son alone, worked as a night shift waitress as Flint grew into adulthood. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Zana was killed by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] that laid waste to her hometown during a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack on Belderone. Believing the Alliance responsible for his mother's death, Flint joined the Empire and was later trained as a [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].<ref name="annual" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zana appeared in [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 3|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 3]], written by [[Mary Jo Duffy]], illustrated by [[Klaus Janson]] and released in [[1983]].<ref name="annual" />
